autoFocus.description: Whether to auto-focus the first input.

autoSubmit.description: Whether to auto-submit the owning form when complete.

blurOnComplete.description: Whether to blur the input when the value is complete.

defaultValue.description: The initial value of the pin input when uncontrolled.

disabled.description: Whether the pin input is disabled.

form.description: The form attribute of the hidden input.

id.description: The id of the pin input.

ids.type:
Partial<{
  root: string
  hiddenInput: string
  label: string
  control: string
  input: (id: string) => string
}>
ids.description: The element ids for the pin input parts.

invalid.description: Whether the pin input is invalid.

mask.description: Whether to mask the input value like a password.

name.description: The name attribute of the hidden input.

otp.description: Whether to flag inputs as OTP for autocomplete.

pattern.description: The regular expression checked against user-entered values.

placeholder.description: The placeholder text for each input slot.

readOnly.description: Whether the pin input is read-only.

required.description: Whether the pin input is required.

selectOnFocus.description: Whether to select the input value when focused.

translations.description: The translations for the pin input.

type.description: The type of value the pin-input should allow.

value.description: The controlled value of the pin input as an array of digit strings.
The pin input primitive returned by usePinInput().

index.description: The zero-based index of this input slot.
